text.tspan: dash runs with job control off:
non-interactive shells never enable monitor mode
Job control is what normally puts a backgrounded job in its
own process group, so Ctrl+C (sent to the foreground group
only) skips it. Dash never does this for a non-interactive
recipe shell, so background and foreground share one group.
A signal that actually reached pgid 243370 would have killed
everything together, uvicorn and its worker included.
